title: 🧩subworkflow - aws terminate ec2 instance
description:
Subworkflow to terminate EC2 instances

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) EC2 instance ID to terminate
additionalInstanceIds: (Optional) Additional instance IDs
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection
guide:
## 🗑️ **Subworkflow to Terminate EC2 Instances**

⚠️ This subworkflow **permanently terminates EC2 instances** via **AWS-TerminateEC2Instance** SSM automation.

**⚡ WARNING: This action is DESTRUCTIVE and IRREVERSIBLE. Terminated instances cannot be recovered.**

---

### ⚙️ **Parameters**

- **instanceId** (Required): 🆔 The EC2 instance ID to terminate.  
- **additionalInstanceIds** (Optional): 🆔 Additional instance IDs (comma-separated).  
- **awsregion** (Required): 🌍 The AWS region.  
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): 🔑 The Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection.

---

### 📘 **AWS SSM Document Used**

**Document Name**: `AWS-TerminateEC2Instance`

🔗 AWS Documentation:  
https://docs.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager-automation-runbooks/latest/userguide/automation-aws-terminateec2instance.html

**What this runbook does:**
- Terminates one or more EC2 instances (destructive operation)
- Removes instances from the console
- Stops all billing
- Cannot be undone

---
